text.title: Architecture Decision Process Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the decision a high-impact or one-way-door choice that meets the prerequisites?

text.example: Question: 'Do we adopt Postgres or Mongo for tenant data?'. Options: Postgres, Mongo, Postgres+JSONB, do-nothing(SQLite), CockroachDB(unconventional). Matrix weights set by CTO + Tech Lead + SRE. Postgres+JSONB scores highest; tie-break = team familiarity. POC: 7 days; integration with existing ORM proven. ADR-DATA-014 Accepted, review at 12 months, review trigger = tenant > 5M rows.
